name: Habas (Fava Beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the habas according to your favorite method for dry beans.
2. When they are done, add the tomatoes and onions and salt.
3. Simmer until the onions are softened, then stir in the cilantro.
Or:
1. Sauté the tomatoes and onions in a little oil until the liquid is reduced.
2. Add the habas and re-fry, mashing some of the beans with the back of a spoon until most of the liquid is absorbed.
3. Stir in the cilantro.
